forecast.description: Chance showers and thunderstorms tonight. High near 72, low around 66. NNE winds around 8 mph.
Scattered showers and thunderstorms morning/afternoon, clearing overnight. High near 82, low around 60. NE winds 9 mph.
Sunny and pleasant. High near 83, low around 62. NNE winds 0–6 mph. Excellent outdoor conditions.
Sunny and hot. High near 89°F, low around 64. WSW winds 0–6 mph. Stay hydrated if exercising outdoors.
Showers and thunderstorms likely. High near 87, low around 64. WSW winds 5–12 mph. 58% precipitation chance.
Chance rain showers. High near 84, low around 60. N winds 5–8 mph. 38% rain chance.
Mostly sunny. High near 84, low around 60. NE winds 3–8 mph. Best outdoor day of the week.

recommendations.reason: Temps warm to hot (82–89°F). Sun has 59% storm chance; Mon 40% storms. Best cycling: Tue Jul 7 (83°F, winds 6 mph, clear) and Sat Jul 11 (84°F, winds 8 mph, 11% rain). Avoid Thu (58% storms, 87°F).
Warm/hot temps 82–89°F with thunderstorm risk Sun, Mon, Thu, Fri. Best running: early mornings Tue Jul 7 or Sat Jul 11. Avoid midday on hot days and any day with >40% storm chance.
YMCA indoor pool always available. Especially appealing midweek when outdoor temps hit 87–89°F and storm risk is high.
Especially recommended Sun (59% storms), Mon (40% storms), Thu (58% storms), and Wed (89°F). YMCA at 400 W Washington St open 5:30 AM–9 PM weekdays, 7 AM–6 PM weekends.
